query: How did global average sea level change between 1993 and 2023?
report:
# How did global average sea level change between 1993 and 2023?

Satellite altimetry shows global mean sea level rose by roughly 100 millimetres between 1993 and 2023 [1]. The rate of rise accelerated over that period, from about 2.1 millimetres per year in the 1990s to roughly 4.5 millimetres per year by the early 2020s [2].

corpus.text: Satellite altimetry shows global mean sea level rose by roughly 100 millimetres between 1993 and 2023.
The rate of global sea-level rise accelerated from about 2.1 millimetres per year in the 1990s to roughly 4.5 millimetres per year by the early 2020s.

expected_behavior: states the total change over the named window
reports the acceleration with grounded figures
